query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS material_suppliers (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  code VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  contactPerson VARCHAR(100),
  contactPhone VARCHAR(50),
  contactEmail VARCHAR(255),
  address TEXT,
  notes TEXT,
  status ENUM('active', 'inactive') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS material_boards (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  supplierId INT NOT NULL,
  boardNumber VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  boardName VARCHAR(255),
  pricePerMeter DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL,
  currency VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'CNY',
  minOrderQuantity INT,
  leadTime INT,
  description TEXT,
  notes TEXT,
  status ENUM('active', 'inactive') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (supplierId) REFERENCES material_suppliers(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  INDEX material_boards_supplier_idx (supplierId),
  INDEX material_boards_number_idx (boardNumber)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS material_colors (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  boardId INT NOT NULL,
  colorCode VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  colorName VARCHAR(255),
  hexColor VARCHAR(7),
  imageUrl TEXT,
  thumbnailUrl TEXT,
  stockQuantity INT,
  notes TEXT,
  status ENUM('active', 'inactive') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
  sortOrder INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (boardId) REFERENCES material_boards(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  INDEX material_colors_board_idx (boardId),
  INDEX material_colors_code_idx (colorCode)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS variant_materials (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  variantId INT NOT NULL,
  materialColorId INT NOT NULL,
  quantityUsed DECIMAL(15,2),
  notes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (variantId) REFERENCES product_variants(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  FOREIGN KEY (materialColorId) REFERENCES material_colors(id),
  INDEX variant_materials_variant_idx (variantId),
  INDEX variant_materials_color_idx (materialColorId)
);
